query: SELECT mes, COUNT(*) as qtd, CAST(CONCAT('20', RIGHT(mes, 2), LPAD(FLOOR(CAST(mes AS UNSIGNED) / 100), 2, '0')) AS UNSIGNED) as ordem FROM consignados WHERE mes IS NOT NULL AND mes != '' GROUP BY mes ORDER BY ordem DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT mes, COUNT(*) as qtd, CAST(CONCAT('20', RIGHT(mes, 2), LPAD(FLOOR(CAST(mes AS UNSIGNED) / 100), 2, '0')) AS UNSIGNED) as ordem FROM consignados WHERE mes IS NOT NULL AND mes != '' GROUP BY mes ORDER BY ordem DESC LIMIT 20;
